title: Dark Factory smoke run
brief: Prove that Foreman can validate a WorkOrder, create a run, record evidence, and fail closed until gates pass.

taskRoute.source: Dark Factory local tooling smoke run
taskRoute.decision: This is local OpenClaw/Dark Factory policy tooling, not main app stage code.

criteria.statement: Foreman validates this WorkOrder and starts a run.
Foreman fails readiness until required evidence and gates pass.
criteria.verification: Run `foreman ready` before and after gate files are present.

coordination.messageTopology: Foreman-mediated handoff; no free-form consensus loop controls shipping.
coordination.authorityDistribution: Foreman owns stage advancement, gate validation, push, and PR commands.
coordination.syncMode: bounded async review with typed verdict files
coordination.aggregation: typed PASS/FAIL/PARTIAL/BLOCKED verdicts with evidence refs
coordination.termination: stop on PASS, budget exhaustion, or BLOCKED escalation
coordination.failureHandling: retry inside loop budget, then escalate without pretending success
coordination.informationPolicy: builders see the frozen contract; hidden holdouts stay with the judge
coordination.computeAccounting: record model/tool usage estimates as evidence, not billing truth
